overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking along a dark highway at night. The character navigates the shoulder of the road as vehicles including RVs, trucks, and cars pass by, eventually crossing near a highway exit sign for Vinewood.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway shoulder with rocky hills in distance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the right shoulder of the highway at night

notable_agents.action: RV with illuminated headlights driving past on the highway

entered.detail: dark asphalt highway surface illuminated by vehicle headlights
rocky hillside terrain visible on the right side of the highway
rocky hillside terrain visible on the left side in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the right shoulder of a dark highway at night. The road stretches ahead with rocky hills visible in the distance on both sides. An RV with bright headlights passes by on the road, illuminating the asphalt surface.

events.description: large green highway sign for Vinewood Hills becomes visible on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the shoulder as traffic passes, approaching the highway exit

notable_agents.action: white RV parked on the roadside shoulder with interior lights visible

entered.detail: large green highway directional sign for Vinewood Hills, Vinewood Bowl, and Los Santos Fwy

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the highway shoulder, approaching an exit ramp. A white RV is parked on the left side of the road. A large green highway sign for Vinewood becomes increasingly visible on the right as the character approaches the intersection.

events.description: character waits on the shoulder for a gap in traffic before crossing
character crosses from the right shoulder to the left shoulder of the highway

agents.ego_description: crossing the highway at the exit ramp while monitoring approaching traffic

notable_agents.action: semi-truck with bright headlights approaching and passing by on the road
black sedan driving past as the character crosses

entered.detail: red octagonal stop sign at the exit ramp intersection

segments.scene_description: At the highway exit, the character waits for a semi-truck and other vehicles to pass before crossing the road. A stop sign is visible at the intersection. After crossing, the character is now on the left shoulder with the rocky terrain much closer on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain highway with rocky walls

agents.ego_description: walking along the left shoulder with rocky walls on both sides of the narrow highway

notable_agents.action: car with headlights approaching in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the left shoulder of a narrower highway section. Rocky walls rise on both sides of the road, creating a more enclosed feeling. The stop sign and exit ramp are now behind as the character proceeds along the winding mountain road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dark highway at night that gradually shifts from an open road into a narrow, enclosed mountain pass. It begins with the character walking along the right shoulder past distant rocky hills, as the bright headlights of a passing RV momentarily illuminate the asphalt. As the character approaches a highway exit, the scene opens up to reveal a parked white RV and a large green sign for Vinewood. The camera then follows the character as they wait for a semi-truck to pass before crossing the road at a stop sign, transitioning from the right shoulder to the left. Finally, the environment tightens as the character proceeds along a winding section of the highway where steep rocky walls rise on both sides, creating a sense of enclosure.
